gist.headline: Daily Diary Updated
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) holding a freshly printed piece of paper (the README) while Polly the bee stamps it with a date stamp. Cozy library or archive setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a freshly printed document while a cute bee mascot stamps it with a tiny date stamp. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a freshly printed document while a cute bee mascot stamps it with a tiny date stamp. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
